problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Combining Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
